name: '✨ Feature Request'
about: 'Suggest an improvement or a new feature for Home Management'

labels: ['enhancement ✨']

---

## 🚀 Requirement

What is the basic functionality you want to see?

---

## 💡 Motivation

Is your feature request related to a specific problem? Please describe. (e.g. "I'm always frustrated when...")

---

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

---

## 💭 Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

---

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
